Interface IPredictUsingRegressionFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Predict Using Regression function arguments.

[Guid("22BCE5C0-7D30-4040-A8F2-0CA0F90EFD7C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPredictUsingRegressionFunctionArguments2 : IPredictUsingRegressionFunctionArguments

object Rasters { get; set; }

object
